_comment: Written by Director agent. Read by Atlas/Nova/Sage at cycle start.

atlas._notes: Atlas runs partition 0 (even-indexed strategies) by default. Set 'assignments' (list of strategy names) to override. 'focus' bubbles named strategies to the front. 'deprioritized' removes them from this cycle.

nova._notes: Nova runs partition 1 (odd-indexed strategies) by default. Same override semantics as atlas.

sage._notes: Sage screens strategies. Director promotes — Sage does NOT auto-promote. 'fix_priority' and 'create_priority' reorder Sage's LLM dispatch queue. 'skip' drops strategies from consideration entirely.

portfolio_notes._notes: Maintain diversification. Correlation check (Lesson #7) required before Director approves any promotion. Control arm (Lesson #9) required alongside new strategy experiments.
